notes: Two-leg GBPCAD/GBPNZD FX cointegration basket from the 2026-07-06 extended screen. The row is borderline and OOS-heavy, not a formal strict survivor: both half-sample ADF tests pass and OOS net Sharpe is 1.66, but DEV net Sharpe is -0.11 and half-life is 84.8 days versus the original 60-day filter.

The scan hedge used for mechanization is positive (0.3460), so the EA trades the second leg in the opposite direction: long spread means long GBPCAD and short GBPNZD, short spread means short GBPCAD and long GBPNZD.
USDCAD.DWX and NZDUSD.DWX are declared for conversion/history warmup under a USD tester account; only GBPCAD.DWX and GBPNZD.DWX are traded.
